title: How to get the number of days in a month
task: Return how many days are in the month of a given date (handles leap years).
keywords: number of days in a month excel
days in month formula google sheets
how many days in february leap year

excel.note: EOMONTH gives the last day of the month; DAY extracts its day number.

explanation: EOMONTH(date, 0) returns the last day of that date's month; DAY() then reads its day-of-month number. February 2024 is a leap year, so it has 29 days. Put your date in A2 and use =DAY(EOMONTH(A2,0)).
